prompt: Inspect the fall protection setup as observed and identify any deficiencies, or confirm it is acceptable.
scenario: A worker at 15 feet on a steel deck wears a full-body harness with clean, unfrayed webbing; the fold-out impact indicator tag is intact and the inspection grid is punched for the current quarter. The lanyard snaps to an engineered anchor strap around a structural beam marked with a rated-anchor tag, connected at shoulder height.
title: Fall protection review (commercial project)
